must_detect.matched_text: Per C S R C guidance and SSE Listing Rules, a blackout window for directors and designated employees is in effect 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-22; insider-list “Project Lantern” is updated in DocSafe Dataroom.
Employment workflows: offer letters for pre-IPO hires must include PIPL consents and acknowledgement of trading restrictions; contractors added to insider list require attestations every 30 days.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: to be transferred to our SG SOC

Per C S R C guidance and SSE Listing Rules, a blackout window for directors and designated employees is in effect 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-22; insider-list “Project Lantern” is updated in DocSafe Dataroom.
Employment workflows: offer letters for pre-IPO hires must include PIPL consents and acknowledgement of trading restrictions; contractors added to insider list require attestations every 30 days.

must_not_detect.reason: Negated MAC; do not label as Material Adverse Change

Educational context only; not a live insider-list context

uncertain.reason: Masked ID does not match strict CN Resident ID pattern but indicates sensitive identifier
Obfuscated ID fragment; ambiguity prevents deterministic match
Obfuscated with spaces; unclear if valid CN Resident ID
Obfuscated payroll account; pattern not sufficient for strict bank_account rule
Formatting and characters deviate from standard 18-char USCC; may evade strict detection
Refers to phone numbers but none present; does not match phone_number pattern
Mention is negated; may be excluded from strict detection despite sensitivity of minors’ data
Looks like an internal room URI; may function as a session or room identifier but rule coverage unclear
Query ticket resembles a tracking token; not clearly covered by existing ID rules
Extension may be a contact identifier but not covered by phone_number rule

_label_note: CN Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered CN public-service-line phone bait, educational insider-list/information-barrier bait, training term-sheet samples, negated material-adverse-change prose, and checksum-valid Resident ID/USCC/mobile/passport positives. Generated checksum-invalid Resident ID/USCC labels were removed from strict must_detect. Post-AE/SA global precision realignment reconciled strict labels to current deterministic output after shared precision/name-parser fixes.

_agent_review.notes: Post-AE/SA global precision realignment: reconciled affected approved strict labels to current deterministic strict-mode findings after shared suppressions/name parsing changed outputs. Covered hyphenated CN/HK/KR person-name spans, Secretariat role-mailbox suppression, phone-like CR/Iqama/National Address/device fragments, Hijri Sha-ban bait, public/HR spa-day bait, and identifier-like large-number suppressions; retained previous labels in ideal_must_detect where useful.

_agent_review_history.notes: Reconciled CN Stage A strict labels to current deterministic strict-mode findings after manual review of raw auto-label mismatches, checksum-invalid Resident ID/USCC labels, public-service-line phone bait, educational insider-list/information-barrier wording, training term-sheet samples, and negated MAC wording; retained non-deterministic statutory/coverage targets in ideal_must_detect.
